title: Deep bug sweep — April 28 2026
description: Confirmed bugs found during a deep sweep across daemon MCP tools, WebSocket/chat behavior, VS Code extension, JetBrains build wrapper, and session memory persistence.
architectureNotes: Focus fixes on minimal, well-tested patches. Do not edit .moe files directly. Daemon state writes must remain centralized through StateManager/writeEntity or explicitly validated file helpers. Preserve current token-budgeting defaults while fixing cursor/read correctness.
epicRails: Every bug fix must add or update a regression test that fails before the fix.
Preserve existing public tool/API behavior except where the current behavior is the bug.
Validate IDs and filesystem paths before writing outside generated entity helpers.
For UI clients, avoid reconnect loops or duplicate WebSocket sends; handle send/close races explicitly.
